summary: Round 2 fix commit 73a031a cleanly resolves all round 1 findings with a minimal, targeted diff (4 files, +5/-1). The high-severity finding is fixed: Theme.Sanctum parent switched from android:Theme.Material.Light.NoActionBar to Theme.Material3.DayNight.NoActionBar, which honors the dark-first UX guideline and matches the Compose Material3 library already on the classpath. The required runtime dependency com.google.android.material:material:1.12.0 was added via a new libs.versions.toml alias (google-android-material) and wired into app/build.gradle.kts — without this, the M3 XML style would fail resource resolution at startup. The cosmetic TODO(Task 10) marker was placed above the Compose stub Box in MainActivity.kt. No regressions: the manifest, Application class, notification permission flow, Hilt setup, and other modules remain untouched. Build is verified green (./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin BUILD SUCCESSFUL). Task 7 is production-ready for the bootstrap milestone.
